# Denali: Revolutionizing Hypersonic Propulsion at Unprecedented Affordability

Anduril Rocket Motor Systems has successfully conducted a static test firing of the Anduril Denali™ 18-inch hypersonic booster at our 450-acre production and test facility in McHenry, Mississippi.
